title: ornithogalum dividens
intro: Ornithogalum dividens, also known as the 'Divided Star of Bethlehem,' is a plant species in the family Asparagaceae, characterized by its white, star-shaped flowers and long, thin leaves. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Ornithogalum dividens include reducing inflammation, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
